title: Isolated Leg Training (ILT) + Sweet Spot
description: Pedaling efficiency before sweet spot work
purpose: Pedaling efficiency before sweet spot work

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0 minutes of work done. 48 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 17% complete. 47 minutes left. Zone 2 is like compound interest — boring but effective.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 60% for 1:00. Where mitochondria multiply and aerobic capacity expands.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 1:00 at 60%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 10 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Conversational pace. 60% FTP. Save your matches for the hard days.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 18% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 18% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 18% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 18% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 1:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-95 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 20% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 45 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 20% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 36 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 62% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 36 minutes of work done. 17 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 62% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 62% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 90% for 12:00. Then 5min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 90% × 12:00. Then 5min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 12:00 at 90%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 90% for 12:00. Then 5min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 90% × 12:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.
